name: Encanto
description: Disney's 2021 Colombia-set animated hit about the magical Madrigal family — and why we don't talk about Bruno.

questions.q: In which South American country is Encanto set?

source.notes: The mountains, music, and architecture reflect Colombian culture.

questions.q: What is the family name at the center of Encanto?

source.notes: The family Madrigal live in a magical house, Casita.

questions.q: Who is the protagonist — the Madrigal without a magical gift?

source.notes: Voiced by Stephanie Beatriz.

questions.q: The family motto is 'We don't talk about' whom?

source.notes: Uncle Bruno — disappeared years ago.

questions.q: Who wrote the original songs for Encanto, including 'We Don't Talk About Bruno'?

source.notes: Miranda also wrote Moana and Hamilton.

questions.q: What magical artifact first granted the Madrigals their gifts?

source.notes: Lit after Abuela's husband sacrificed himself.

questions.q: What is the name of the family's sentient magical house?

source.notes: Casita literally means 'little house.'

questions.q: What is Mirabel's grandmother's first name?

source.notes: Abuela Alma Madrigal, voiced by María Cecilia Botero.

questions.q: What is Uncle Bruno's magical gift?

source.notes: Uses visions on glass shards.

questions.q: What is cousin Antonio's gift, revealed at his ceremony?

source.notes: His room has a jungle inside.

questions.q: What is Luisa's gift?

source.notes: Luisa carries donkeys, churches, and pianos without strain.

questions.q: What is the beautiful eldest sister Isabela's gift?

source.notes: Later in the film she creates less-perfect, more daring plants like cacti.

questions.q: What is Mirabel's mother Julieta's gift?

source.notes: Her arepas cure illness and injury.

questions.q: Which character has super-hearing, allowing her to hear a pin drop?

source.notes: Daughter of Pepa.

questions.q: What is the gift of Mirabel's aunt Pepa?
choices: Controlling the weather with her emotions

source.notes: Rain clouds literally form over her head when she's upset.

questions.q: Which Bruno vision keeps reappearing, driving the plot?

source.notes: Mirabel sees it first reassembled from shards.

questions.q: What cousin Camilo can do is what?

source.notes: Son of Pepa; voiced by Rhenzy Feliz.

questions.q: Which insect features prominently in Bruno's visions and on Mirabel's embroidered skirt?

source.notes: A yellow butterfly is Encanto's visual motif.

questions.q: Which song did 'We Don't Talk About Bruno' famously displace from the top of the Billboard Hot 100 in 2022?
choices: It became Disney's first Hot-100 #1 in 30 years

source.notes: First Disney song to top the Billboard Hot 100 since 'A Whole New World' (1993).

questions.q: Which Colombian actress voices matriarch Abuela Alma in the original English version?

source.notes: Beloved Colombian film and telenovela actress.

questions.q: Who directs Encanto (2021) alongside Byron Howard?

source.notes: Bush co-directed and co-wrote; Howard previously directed Zootopia.

questions.q: Encanto won the 2022 Academy Award in which category?

source.notes: Won at the 94th Academy Awards (March 2022).
